BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Back-of-napkin for the DuPage County Historical Society after Linda mentioned the building lease may rise with property taxes. Pre-board review.

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate only. Revisit with the board treasurer once 2026 actuals close.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Building lease rises to $1,950/mo if property tax passes through
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $4,030 + $150 increase = $4,180. At $50/member, $4,180 / $50 = 83.6 -> 84 members minimum.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Manageable. Well within buffer at 120 members.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is ~84-88 members at the current cost structure. At 120 members there is plenty of headroom.
ActionItems: Confirm the property tax situation with the county
Revisit after year-end with the board treasurer
